---
title: "I Love Testing"
subtitle: "Training on testing for bioinformatics pipelines"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.callout-note}
🇫🇷 [Version française](../index.qmd)
:::

Training on writing automated tests for Bash scripts, Python/R functions, and Nextflow pipelines.
Each module combines a slide deck and a hands-on exercise.

::: {.callout-note}
Before you start: check the [prerequisites](prerequisites.qmd) (expected languages, framework installation).
:::

---

## Learning path

| Step | Module |
|------|--------|
| 1 | [Why test](slides/01_intro.qmd) · [Testing concepts](slides/02_testing_concepts.qmd) |
| 2 | [Bash · Python · R](slides/03_bash_python_r.qmd) → [ex. 01](exercises/01_bash/README.qmd) · [ex. 02](exercises/02_python/README.qmd) · [ex. 03](exercises/03_r/README.qmd) |
| 3 | [Nextflow / nf-test](slides/04_nf_test.qmd) → [ex. 04](exercises/04_nextflow/README.qmd) |
| 4 | [Testing without an exact oracle](slides/06_bioinformatics_testing.qmd) → [ex. 06](exercises/06_metamorphic/README.qmd) |
| 5 | [Strategy for small teams](slides/07_small_team_strategy.qmd) |
| Bonus | [Apptainer containers](slides/05_container_testing.qmd) → [ex. 05](exercises/05_testing_containers/README.qmd) |

---

## Installation

```bash
git clone https://github.com/chrstphdm/ilovetesting.git
cd ilovetesting
bash setup.sh
conda activate ilovetesting
```

---

## Running the tests

```bash
pytest -v --tb=short                                          # Python
bats training/tests/bats/                                    # Bash
Rscript -e "testthat::test_dir('training/tests/testthat/')"  # R
cd training/tests/nf-test && nf-test test --verbose          # Nextflow
```

---

## Reference

| Page | Content |
|------|---------|
| [Prerequisites](prerequisites.qmd) | Expected languages, framework installation |
| [Methodology](testing-methodology.qmd) | AAA, test types, oracle problem, anti-patterns |
| [Decision matrix](testing-matrix.qmd) | What to test, when, with which tool |
| [Snapshot policy](snapshot-policy.qmd) | Rules for creating and updating snapshots |
| [Container policy](container-policy.qmd) | Tags, `.def`, `.sif`, test levels |
| [FAQ](faq.qmd) | Frequently asked questions |
